message:
Running command: # Find what variable gates CTS step
grep -n "gating\|Gating\|gating_variable\|gating_var" /nix/store/zkzv2pzi9yp00dmvlcvkdh2kxykicfqk-python3.13-librelane-3.0.2/lib/python3.13/site-packages/librelane/steps/step.py 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
# Find the gating var for CTS
grep -B5 -A5 "gating" /nix/store/zkzv2pzi9yp00dmvlcvkdh2kxykicfqk-python3.13-librelane-3.0.2/lib/python3.13/site-packages/librelane/steps/openroad.py | grep -A5 -B5 "CTS\|cts" | head -30
